entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., a salt-sensitive crop whose yields are restricted by salinity

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by high salt concentration that restricts crop yields

entities.name: SALT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain growth and yield under saline conditions

entities.name: ICC 6263
entities.description: A salt-sensitive chickpea land race used in inter-crossing

entities.name: ICC 1431
entities.description: A salt-tolerant chickpea land race used in inter-crossing

entities.name: GENERATION MEAN ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to study gene action in different populations

entities.name: GENE ACTION
entities.description: The interaction of genes that determines the expression of traits

entities.name: DAYS TO FLOWERING
entities.description: The number of days from sowing to the appearance of flowers

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: The number of days from sowing to the completion of seed development

entities.name: STEM NA CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of sodium ions in the plant stem

entities.name: STEM K CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of potassium ions in the plant stem

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds, used as an indicator of seed size

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of seed produced per plant or area

entities.name: PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: The number of pods produced by a single plant

entities.name: SEEDS PER PLANT
entities.description: The number of seeds produced by a single plant

entities.name: STEM CL CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of chlorine ions in the plant stem

entities.name: ADDITIVE EFFECTS
entities.description: Genetic effects where the phenotype is the sum of the effects of individual alleles

entities.name: BROAD-SENSE HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of total phenotypic variance that is attributable to all genetic factors

entities.name: NARROW-SENSE HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of total phenotypic variance that is attributable to additive genetic variance

entities.name: GENE FIXATION
entities.description: The process by which a specific allele becomes the only allele for a gene in a population

relationships.description: selection for yield under salinity is more effective after gene fixation
